blocks.text: Comeback night: Anfield and the Metropolitano on the edge
Both sides trail 2-0 from the first leg. Liverpool conjure miracles at Anfield; Barcelona must silence the Metropolitano. European nights don't get bigger than this.
🎮 IEM Rio — rain, hallzerk & sense flying the Norwegian flag in Brazil
